title: AFFORDABLE HOUSING - 211info
text: ROSE COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides listings of affordable rental housing. All properties are operated by specific property management companies, not the agency itself. 10325 SE Holgate Blvd #121 Portland, OR 972662457 Eligibility: Varies by property. Generally serves families with limited income. Some properties serve age 55 and older. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (360) 696-9000 , Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 696-9000 Quantum Residential, property management Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to view listings and contact individual property management companies for more information. Applications are not available through the main office. FEES: Varies by property DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Community Housing Development Organizations Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROSE COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
